
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567=d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567][p.getNameCount()=7]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.subpath(0, 1)=d1]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.subpath(2, 5)=d123\d1234\d12345]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(0)=d1]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(1)=d12]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(2)=d123]
[d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(3)=d1234]

[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567=\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567][p.getNameCount()=7]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.subpath(0, 1)=d1]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.subpath(2, 5)=d123\d1234\d12345]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(0)=d1]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(1)=d12]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(2)=d123]
[\d1\d12\d123\d1234\d12345\d123456\d1234567.getName(3)=d1234]

[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567=d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567][p.getNameCount()=13]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(0, 1)=d1]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(2, 5)=d12\..\d123]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(2, 8)=d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(0)=d1]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(1)=.]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(2)=d12]
[d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(3)=..]

[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567=\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567][p.getNameCount()=13]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(0, 1)=d1]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(2, 5)=d12\..\d123]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.subpath(2, 8)=d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(0)=d1]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(1)=.]
[\d1\.\d12\..\d123\.\d1234\..\d12345\.\d123456\..\d1234567.getName(2)=d12]
